mapper.select: SELECT file_oid, tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, img_sbst_txt_cn, dwnld_cnt, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_nm = #{tblNm} AND tbl_oid = #{tblOid} AND file_type = 'ATTACHMENT' AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT file_oid, tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, dwnld_cnt, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_nm = #{tblNm} AND tbl_oid = #{tblOid} AND file_type = 'INLINE' AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT file_oid, tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, dwnld_cnt, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.file WHERE file_oid = #{fileOid} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.file( tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, img_sbst_txt_cn, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, reg_id, mdfcn_id ) VALUES ( #{tblNm}, #{tblOid}, #{orgnlFileNm}, #{strgFileNm}, #{strgFilePath}, #{strgFileCpct}, #{strgSmlFileNm}, #{strgSmlFilePath}, #{strgSmlFileCpct}, #{strgMdFileNm}, #{strgMdFilePath}, #{strgMdFileCpct}, #{fileTypeNm}, #{fileType}, #{thmbYn}, #{imgSbstTxtCn}, #{atchFileSeq}, #{fileExpln}, #{useYn}, #{regId}, #{mdfcnId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.file SET img_sbst_txt_cn = #{imgSbstTxtCn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE file_oid = #{fileOid}
UPDATE ${schema}.file SET tbl_oid = #{tblOid}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE file_oid = #{fileOid}
mapper.select:
SELECT file_oid AS fileOid, strg_file_path AS filePath, strg_file_nm AS fileName FROM ${schema}.file WHERE file_oid IN
#{fileOid}

SELECT DISTINCT strg_file_path FROM ${schema}.file WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND strg_file_path IS NOT NULL AND strg_file_path != '' UNION SELECT DISTINCT strg_sml_file_path FROM ${schema}.file WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND strg_sml_file_path IS NOT NULL AND strg_sml_file_path != '' UNION SELECT DISTINCT strg_md_file_path FROM ${schema}.file WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND strg_md_file_path IS NOT NULL AND strg_md_file_path != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.file ( tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, img_sbst_txt_cn, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, reg_id, mdfcn_id ) SELECT tbl_nm, #{newTablePk}, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, strg_sml_file_nm, strg_sml_file_path, strg_sml_file_cpct, strg_md_file_nm, strg_md_file_path, strg_md_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, img_sbst_txt_cn, atch_file_seq, file_expln, use_yn, #{regId}, #{regId} FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_nm = #{tblNm} AND tbl_oid = #{oldTablePk} AND use_yn = 'Y'
